summary: Iteration 97: Successfully tested all 5 distinct product page layouts. All layouts render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. QuickBuyLayout, WizardLayout, ApplicationLayout, ShowcaseLayout, and ClassicLayout all working. Subscription indicator and Terms link features verified. Dialog accessibility warnings still present - DialogTitle missing in product edit dialog.

issues: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility - console warning present
Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - console warning present

passed_tests: ClassicLayout renders with data-testid='classic-layout' for standard products (TB Starter Plan)
QuickBuyLayout renders with data-testid='quick-buy-layout' for quick_buy products (Quick Buy Demo)
WizardLayout renders with data-testid='wizard-layout' with step progress (Wizard Form Demo)
ApplicationLayout renders with data-testid='application-layout' with sidebar nav (Enterprise Application)
ShowcaseLayout renders with data-testid='showcase-layout' with hero section (Showcase Calculator)
Subscription indicator shows for is_subscription products (TB Starter Plan, Quick Buy Demo, TEST96_Subscription_With_Terms)
Terms link shows when terms_id is set (TEST96_Subscription_With_Terms - href=/terms/default-terms)
WizardLayout shows wizard-step-0, wizard-next-btn, wizard-prev-btn elements
ApplicationLayout shows nav-overview, nav-questions, nav-pricing, nav-faqs navigation items
ShowcaseLayout shows showcase-cta button and hero section with gradient
Admin product form shows PAGE LAYOUT dropdown with 'Application Form' layout option visible
action_items: ACCESSIBILITY: Add DialogTitle to product edit dialog for screen reader compatibility (still showing console warnings)
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all Dialog components use DialogTitle and DialogDescription properly
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 layout components properly implemented with unique data-testid attributes
Layout router (index.tsx) correctly maps layout types to components using lazy loading
QuickBuyLayout: Compact price-first design with dark hero card - working
WizardLayout: Step-by-step progress bar with numbered step indicators - working
ApplicationLayout: Sidebar navigation with sections (Overview, Application Form, Pricing, FAQs) - working
ShowcaseLayout: Gradient hero with Configure & Price calculator - working
ClassicLayout: Two-column layout with sticky price summary - working
dialog.jsx updated with hidden DialogDescription but warnings still appear on existing dialogs
seed_data_creation: Used existing test products: Quick Buy Demo (quick_buy layout), Wizard Form Demo (wizard layout), Enterprise Application (application layout), Showcase Calculator (showcase layout), TB Starter Plan (standard/classic layout), TEST96_Subscription_With_Terms (subscription + terms)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 product layouts fully implemented and working. Quick Buy Demo at /product/b6ca07a5-1435-4316-8558-406324c4bd3d (quick_buy), Wizard Form Demo at /product/d3f52313-88ad-4b33-bfa6-416f08e1b06c (wizard), Enterprise Application at /product/76211824-7770-46de-a989-b729fcf4c5ac (application), Showcase Calculator at /product/2cd3ad09-c206-41b6-adac-25d20e38869f (showcase).
